---
title: "MAD213 Basic Statistics, Week 03" 
description: "Lecture: Measures of location and dispersion"
date: 2020-10-23T00:01:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: [mad213_lecturenotes,mad213_lecturenotes_week03]
comments: false
---
```{r , echo=FALSE}
library(kableExtra)
text_tbl <- data.frame(
Date=c("October 7","October 23"),
Topic=c("[Introduction](/posts/091020_post01_mad213t/index.html)",
        "Measures of location and dispersion  (Lecture slides [link](/upload/mad213t_w03_oct23.pdf))")
)

kbl(text_tbl,escape = F) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = T)%>%
  column_spec(1, width = "8em")%>%
    column_spec(2, width = "40em")%>%
  row_spec(2, background = "orange", color="black", bold = TRUE)%>%
  row_spec(1, color="lightgrey",background = "white")

```

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("bar_chart")`
